findings.evidence: The PDF uses center-aligned formatting for titles, images, and body text typical of a presentation slide. The HTML conversion forces all elements to a standard left-alignment.

The PDF contains a visual diagram of nested ovals demonstrating that 'River Basin Modeling' is a subset of 'Water Supply Planning'. The HTML conversion completely drops the graphic shapes, extracting only the text as separate paragraphs, which destroys the visual and semantic relationship.
